fields.label: Subheadline
fields.default: Discover how our Sales & Innovation Sprint helps you execute better, negotiate smarter, and grow sustainably.

fields.label: Program Description
fields.default: Accelerating B2B Growth With Sales & Innovation is a high-impact, modular program designed to equip corporate sales teams and innovation leaders with agile B2B sales strategies, advanced negotiation frameworks, and practical financial insights.

fields.label: Event Format Details
fields.default:
Format: Workshop

Method: Hybrid (Self-Paced Learning + Live Online Sessions)

Duration: ± 6-7 Learning Hours

  • Self-Paced Learning: 4 hours
  • Online Live Session: 90 minutes/session × 2 sessions = 3 hours

fields.label: Modules List
fields.default:
• The Modern B2B Sales Landscape & Customer-Centric Strategy
  • Sales Strategy & Customer Success
  • Live Session 1 with Martin Giese: Sales Sprint Workshop
  • B2B Negotiation Strategy
  • Business Model & Financial Insight
  • Live Session 2 with Martin Giese: Sales & Innovation Deep Dive

fields.label: Speaker Title
fields.default: Helping Startups as Coach, Advisor, Investor, & Board Member

fields.label: Speaker Bio
fields.default: Our Expert is a seasoned startup investor, coach, and author specializing in B2B sales, go-to-market strategy, and startup financing. He has supported deeptech and early-stage startups in securing early customers and attracting leading investors such as A16z, Tiger Global, and BMW iVentures. Formerly a Managing Director at Vodafone Kabel Deutschland, where he helped lead a successful IPO and major acquisition, he now leads Munich's DeepTech Incubator XPRENEURS.

fields.label: About Body
fields.default: PINTAR is a certified B Corporation that provides software solutions and services to help overcome challenges in talent recruitment, competency development, and employee performance management. Our clients include companies, governments, and educational institutions that focus on improving competitiveness through human resource development.
